name: Meaty Gnat
description: A huge gnat variant that dominates the Trash Heap. It looks harmless at first glance, but its gas cloud turns a simple boop into a real threat.

attacks.name: Heavy Boop
attacks.tell: It descends slowly and bumps you with much more weight than a normal gnat.
attacks.howToAvoid: Back off before it enters your personal space or knock it down with ranged damage.
attacks.notes: The real danger is not the shove itself, but the gas cloud that comes with it.

specialTraits: Its gaseous aura damages like rotten food gas and does not fully clear until the corpse is looted. It is also one of the few renewable Candy Cornlet sources outside seasonal events.
behavior: It behaves like an oversized gnat: slower, higher-flying, and often carrying clumps of rotten food. Its size makes it easier to spot, but much more obnoxious once it drifts into you.
interactionWithPlayer: It chases the player to boop them just like a normal gnat, but the gas cloud around it makes those close passes far more dangerous. To remove the gas, killing it is not enough: you have to loot it.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually stays far from other creatures and has no meaningful interactions with them. Its real territory is the stinking air of the Trash Heap.
strategy: A Gas Mask, Gastro Goo, or the Toxicology Badge helps enormously. If possible, shoot it before it gets close, and remember to loot the body quickly to clear the cloud.
